hero.title: Louvre tickets and audio guides with e‑guide
hero.subtitle: Skip the lines and discover Paris' must‑see attractions

louvre.title: Louvre Museum
louvre.description: Discover the world's largest art museum. Mona Lisa, Liberty Leading the People and thousands of masterpieces await you.

eiffel.title: Eiffel Tower
eiffel.description: Paris's iconic landmark. Stunning city views from the second or third floor.

seine.title: Seine River Cruise
seine.description: Romantic boat cruise on the Seine. Paris's finest monuments from the water.

home.selectDesc: Tickets and tours for Paris’ most famous attractions.
home.featuresDesc: Louvre tickets, Eiffel Tower access and Seine River cruises — all in one place.
home.feat1Desc: Full access to the attractions with clearly described inclusions before checkout.
home.feat2Desc: Your booking is confirmed right after purchase, tickets sent within minutes.
home.feat3Desc: Show your mobile ticket at the entrance – just keep the QR code visible.
home.feat4Desc: English-speaking support team by email and chat to help with your visit.

footer.paymentDesc: We accept all major credit cards. Encrypted by Stripe.
